item.title: Malta Inc. Featured on X’s Moonshot Podcast with Raj Apte - Malta Inc.
item.description: In the latest episode of the X Moonshot Podcast, Raj Apte, former Project Lead for Project Malta at X, shares the story behind the creation of Malta and its journey from concept to company.

item.title: ACWA Partners with Malta Inc. - Malta Inc.
item.description: Pioneering collaboration announced at ACWA Power Innovation Days in Riyadh.

item.title: Malta Inc. Featured in Revista Haz - Malta Inc.
item.description: Revista Haz has published a new article on Project Finance and the Decarbonization of the Economy, featuring insights from Philippe Delleville, President and

item.title: Malta Inc. Featured in Newsweek’s Pillars of the Green Transition 2025 - Malta Inc.
item.description: Our President & CEO, Philippe Delleville, joins global leaders in discussing the economic and strategic imperatives shaping energy security, circular supply chains and transport reform.

item.title: Could Aging Coal Plants Be Transformed into Renewable Data Center Energy Storage? - Malta Inc.
item.description: Malta Inc. is featured in a thought-provoking piece by Data Center Knowledge, where MIT researchers explore how retiring coal power plants could be retrofitted into thermal energy storage facilities supporting zero‑carbon data centers.

item.title: Malta Inc. Featured in Investment Reports: Interview with CEO Phil Delleville - Malta Inc.
item.description: In the interview, Phil shares his vision for a future powered by clean energy—one that supports industrial decarbonization, strengthens grid resilience, and unlocks new value for existing infrastructure.

item.title: BBVA and Malta Iberia sign an agreement to promote long-duration energy storage in Spain - Malta Inc.
item.description: The agreement contributes to the development of climate technologies, or cleantech, in a first-of-a-kind project to support European energy resilience, helping stabilize the power grid and promoting decarbonization in the energy industry.

item.title: Malta Hosts Workshop and Site Visit - Malta Inc.
item.description: Malta Inc. hosted a workshop and site visit at the future location of its 14 MWhₑ Malta-D commercial demonstration project in Puertollano, welcoming over 60 participants from nearly 30 organizations.

item.title: Malta Inc. Awarded on both the World’s Top GreenTech Companies 2025 and America’s Top GreenTech Companies 2025 Lists by TIME Magazine - Malta Inc.
item.description: This prestigious award is presented by TIME and Statista Inc., the leading statistics portal and industry ranking provider. The award lists were announced on March 25th, 2025.

item.title: Malta Inc. Triumphs at EUPD Research Awards - Malta Inc.
item.description: Recognized for Innovation Excellence in Energy Storage for the MEA Region.
